description: Phase WX-K.3 (2026-05-20) — minimal recipe for the `endproduct` chip per HARNESS_PATHWAY_TAXONOMY.md. Fires for single-call media or document generation (image / audio-music / audio-voice / video / document / quiz / icon / podcast). Target body size <5KB. The chip's subtype (e.g., image) is set on HarnessGoal.category by the classifier; the dispatcher reads the per-subtype prompt-template.md from mchatai-source/endproduct-pathways/{subtype}/ before calling the subtype-specific gen API (DreamSnapImageGenService for image, future Lyria service for audio-music, etc.). v1 ships with the same 3-layer shape as refine — user-goal carries the user's request, user-references carries any attached source image/style ref, history-recent carries prior conversation. Future versions (K.3.b+) may add endproduct-prompt-template + endproduct-model-picker loaders for explicit per-subtype context injection.
